task_completion.description: Remove the B1 Bus Route from the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashed grey line previously labeled 'B1 Bus Route' is no longer visible anywhere on the diagram.

task_completion.description: Add the Silver Line connecting Westside Terminal, Stadium, Central Plaza, and Airport with correct styling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new thick grey line (#A0A0A0, 12pt width) connects Westside Terminal, Stadium, Central Plaza, and Airport. The line uses orthogonal/schematic edges (only 45 or 90-degree angles, no arbitrary curves or straight direct diagonals).

task_completion.description: Route the Silver Line parallel to the Red Line between Stadium and Central Plaza.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Between the 'Stadium' and 'Central Plaza' stations, the new Silver Line runs alongside (parallel to) the existing Red Line without overlapping or crossing it.

task_completion.description: Convert Stadium and Central Plaza into Interchange Stations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The station markers for 'Stadium' and 'Central Plaza' are changed to Circle or Capsule shapes, distinguishing them as interchange stations.

task_completion.description: Add station ticks for Tech Hub and Airport, and rename Market St.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Tech Hub' and 'Airport' stations have tick marks on the line. The station previously named 'Market St' is now explicitly labeled 'Financial District'.

task_completion.description: Add Wheelchair accessibility icons to Airport and Central Plaza.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Wheelchair icons are placed next to or inside the 'Airport' and 'Central Plaza' station markers.

task_completion.description: Export the final map as a PDF to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or PDF viewer shows that 'metro_map_v2.pdf' has been successfully created in the '~/Diagrams/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the draw.io graphical interface to edit the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the draw.io (diagrams.net) application window, using its tools and menus to modify the map.

integrity.description: Agent used the draw.io export functionality to create the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating to File -> Export as -> PDF within draw.io, rather than using a CLI tool to convert the file.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply overwrite the .drawio file with a pre-written XML string via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to echo or cat a massive XML payload directly into 'metro_system_map.drawio'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Silver Line must be colored #A0A0A0 (grey) and have a stroke width of 12pt. The old station 'Market St' must be renamed to 'Financial District'. The 'B1 Bus Route' must be completely removed. The final PDF must be exported to /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/metro_map_v2.pdf.
